name: Labyrinth Wall Shadow
name_jp: ラビリンス・ウォール・シャドウ
desc: Monsters cannot attack the turn they are Summoned, except monsters whose original Level is 5 or higher. Once per turn, during your Main Phase: You can place 1 of your "Sanga of the Thunder", "Kazejin", or "Suijin" that is banished, or in your hand or Deck, face-up in your Spell & Trap Zone as a Continuous Spell. At the start of your opponent's Battle Phase: You can target 1 monster your opponent controls with less than 1600 ATK; destroy it.
eff: Monsters cannot attack the turn they are Summoned, except monsters whose original Level is 5 or higher. Once per turn, during your Main Phase: You can place 1 of your "Sanga of the Thunder", "Kazejin", or "Suijin" that is banished, or in your hand or Deck, face-up in your Spell & Trap Zone as a Continuous Spell. At the start of your opponent's Battle Phase: You can target 1 monster your opponent controls with less than 1600 ATK; destroy it.

action: Places the player's banished cards in Spell & Trap Zone
Places cards from hand in Spell & Trap Zone
Places cards from Deck in Spell & Trap Zone
mst: Treats monsters as Continuous Spell Cards
Destroys your opponent's face-up Monster Cards
attack: Prevents your opponent's monsters from attacking
misc: At the start of the Battle Phase
